name: Can I get paid for permanent damage from work chemicals in Saint George?
description: Yes, PPD benefits per impairment schedule.[2][5]

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, permanent partial disability benefits based on impairment rating.[2] Medical panel assesses.[5] Key factors: Objective tests, function loss. Appeal low ratings; lawyer negotiates higher awards.
